response.original_title: El 28 de julio de 1913 en París
response.overview: It contains: the Peruvian astronaut Ignacio A. Ramos passes the tests prescribed by the Aero Club of France before piloting the airship; Ramos checks the functioning of the aerostat's systems in the presence of the pilot, Professor Rossell, and the Astra company staff; final instructions from the professor; departure of M. Chenu, airship engine builder, and engineer Ramos, who pass their tests on the same day; in the clouds, at 500 meters altitude; descent after a 3-hour flight; congratulations to the astronaut; Chez Laurent on the Champs-Élysées; banquet organized in celebration of Peru's anniversary; Colonel Abril hosts the party; José Payán delivers a speech that excites the audience; Carlos Cáceres, a notable Peruvian baritone, sings the national anthem; Miguel Miró Quesada and two young ladies crown the glorious Bielo; departure of the audience; etc.
response.title: El 28 de julio de 1913 en París
